requirements.summary: Find and replace all incorrect or inconsistent spellings of 'Ummeed' with the correct spelling across all frontend source files
acceptanceCriteria: The string 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' appears consistently and correctly spelled in all locations where the tagline is displayed (Hero section, Navigation, Footer, About section, etc.).
No incorrect variants such as 'Ummid', 'Umeed', or 'Umid' remain anywhere in the frontend source files or rendered UI.
All visible page text, meta content, and component props referencing the tagline use the spelling 'Ummeed'.

file_operations.description: Review and correct any misspellings of 'Ummeed' in the tagline badge, ensuring it displays 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' consistently.
Search for and replace any incorrect variants of 'Ummeed' (such as 'Ummid', 'Umeed', 'Umid') with the correct spelling 'Ummeed' in all text content including mission statements and descriptive text.
Check service descriptions and titles for any misspellings of 'Ummeed' and correct them to use the proper spelling.
Review contact section text content for any incorrect spellings of 'Ummeed' and replace with the correct spelling.
Ensure navigation links, labels, and any displayed text use the correct spelling 'Ummeed' throughout.
Check footer content including taglines, descriptions, and informational text for misspellings of 'Ummeed' and correct them.
Review Home page component for any text props or content containing 'Ummeed' variants and ensure correct spelling is used.
Check App component for any references to the tagline or 'Ummeed' and correct spelling if found.
Review HTML meta tags, title, and any inline text for misspellings of 'Ummeed' and ensure the correct spelling is used throughout.
